channel.title: Ajahn Jayasāro Quotes
channel.description: Dhamma quotes by Ajahn Jayasāro, updated every 6 hours

item.title: Ajahn Jayasāro: New Year Blessing 2024 “I would like to encourage everyone to use the teachings of the Buddha, use the teachings of the great…
item.description:
Ajahn Jayasāro:
New Year Blessing 2024

“I would like to encourage everyone to use the teachings of the Buddha, use the teachings of the great teachers in our tradition, put them into practice in your life and see.”

Ajahn Jayasāro
